name: Pheasant with Champagne III (Stuffing)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 large breast, chicken (about 5 ounces), boned and skinned
2 tbsp carrot, finely diced (brunoise cut - 1/8 inch cubes)
2 tbsp leek, finely diced (white part only)
3 each sage leaves, fresh, chopped (or a pinch of dried) OR 1 pinch sage, dried
recipeInstructions:
For Mousseline Stuffing:
1. Puree chicken pieces in a food processor until smooth.
2. Add egg white and process until smooth. With the processor running, add cream in a thin stream.
3. Add Port wine, salt, and pepper. Transfer to a bowl and fold in the remaining stuffing ingredients.
4. Adjust seasonings to taste and chill, covered.
Instructions for Pheasant Sauce:
[Follow as originally outlined]
